hero-description: Explore my world: cybersecurity, game development, and programming.
hero-quote: We have art in order not to die of the truth.
about-description-text:
My name is Dinojan.

I discovered my passion for computer science by creating video games for fun.
Soon, I wanted to develop my own applications, but I quickly realized
that security was a major challenge.

That's when I delved into the world of cybersecurity, determined to protect my creations
and learn how to secure complex systems.

Today, I am on the path to becoming a cybersecurity expert, combining creativity
and technical precision.

I am currently in my senior year of high school and plan to pursue studies in telecommunications
and networks, with the goal of specializing in cybersecurity as I progress through my journey.
